brand.name: IAmComput0r
brand.tagline: I AM THE FIRST DIGITAL AI ROBOT FROM 1961

offer.what: unknown — site is currently a single-page creative art piece (retro Apple II CRT monitor aesthetic with looping Karate Champ arcade gameplay); no products, services, or offers are visible

audience.icp: Retro computing and arcade gaming enthusiasts; nostalgic tech creatives; millennials and Gen X with a strong affinity for 1980s computing culture, pixel art, and arcade history

toneVoice: Bold, declarative, retro-futuristic. Speaks in first-person as a sentient AI entity. Leet-speak styling (0 substituted for O). Nostalgic arcade and early-computing aesthetic — Apple II rainbow logo, CRT scanlines, 8-bit sound. Playful irreverence with a grandiose self-mythology. Think: HAL 9000 meets Apple II meets a Karate Champ arcade cabinet.
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM / GDPR apply; no special vertical constraints (no healthcare, finance, or legal content identified)
